args:
set -eu
first_bundle=$(mktemp -d)
second_bundle=$(mktemp -d)
cache_root=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$first_bundle" --cache-root "$cache_root" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
second_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$second_bundle" --cache-root "$cache_root" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness)
printf '%s' "$second_out" | grep -q 'reused=2'
python3 - "$first_bundle/materialization_report.json" "$second_bundle/materialization_report.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
first = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
second = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
assert first['executed_artifact_count'] >= second['executed_artifact_count']
assert second['reused_artifact_count'] >= first['reused_artifact_count']
PY
printf 'memory-cache-root-churn\n'
